SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-13-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-07-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GREGGORY D JOHNSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MATTRESS FIRM INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JUAN FLOREZ, SENIOR MANAGER AND MICHAEL PIERCE, SENIOR DISTRICT MANAGER. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $1035.29 TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE SEP-07TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $99.00) SERVED MAY-27-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MATTRESS FIRM INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION
REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.
